title: Component Passport v1.1 stays proposal-only; active rc1 schema untouched
reason: A draft proposed mutating the frozen Component Passport schema, embedding authoritative geometry/evidence objects, seeding unverified procedure graphs, and inventing scores while edts-kernel-v1.0.0-rc1 is frozen and no door geometry bytes exist. Active truth must remain the rc1 index/summary passport; future design stays non-authoritative.
decision: Do not modify active schemas/component-passport.schema.json (byte-identical to tag edts-kernel-v1.0.0-rc1).
Capture corrected architecture only under proposals/ as OPTIONAL_FUTURE_PROPOSAL.
Passport remains an index + status summary; authoritative records stay in their registries.
Do not seed unverified removal/procedure graphs or invented numeric scores.
Candidates are not geometry assets until ACQUIRED→HASHED→PARSED→INVENTORIED→ROLE_EVALUATED.
Illustrative v1.1 instances must live under proposals/examples/ with authority_status ILLUSTRATIVE_ONLY and runtime_eligible false.
